lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਭੇਟੈ ਤਾ ਫਲੁ ਪਾਏ ਸਚੁ ਕਰਣੀ ਸੁਖ ਸਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: satigur bhettai taa fal paae sach karanee sukh saar |
lines.english: Meeting the True Guru, the fruitful rewards are obtained. This true lifestyle beings sublime peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੇ ਨਾਮਿ ਮਿਲੈ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਏ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naame naam milai vaddiaaee jis no man vasaae |2|
lines.english: Through the Naam, glorious greatness is obtained; he alone obtains it, whose mind is filled with the Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇ ਜਨ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਜੋ ਹਰਿ ਲਾਗੇ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੇ ਧਰਹਿ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: se jan niramal jo har laage har naame dhareh piaar |3|
lines.english: Those humble beings who are attached to the Lord are immaculate; they enshrine love for the Lord's Name. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਕੀ ਰੇਣੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਤਾਂ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਲਾਈ ਜਿਨ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਪੂਰਾ ਧਿਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: tin kee ren milai taan masatak laaee jin satigur pooraa dhiaaeaa |
lines.english: If I obtain the dust of their feet, I apply it to my forehead. They meditate on the Perfect True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਨ ਕੀ ਰੇਣੁ ਪੂਰੈ ਭਾਗਿ ਪਾਈਐ ਜਿਨੀ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮਿ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇਆ ॥੪॥੩॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: naanak tin kee ren poorai bhaag paaeeai jinee raam naam chit laaeaa |4|3|13|
lines.english: O Nanak, this dust is obtained only by perfect destiny. They focus their consciousness on the Lord's Name. ||4||3||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦੁ ਬੀਚਾਰੇ ਸੋ ਜਨੁ ਸਾਚਾ ਜਿਨ ਕੈ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਸਾਚਾ ਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: sabad beechaare so jan saachaa jin kai hiradai saachaa soee |
lines.english: That humble being who contemplates the Word of the Shabad is true; the True Lord is within his heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈਰਉ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: bhairau mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Bhairao, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤੁ ਭਗਤੁ ਕਹੈ ਸਭੁ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: bhagat bhagat kahai sabh koee |
lines.english: Everyone calls him, "Devotee, devotee."

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚੀ ਭਗਤਿ ਕਰਹਿ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤੀ ਤਾਂ ਤਨਿ ਦੂਖੁ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: saachee bhagat kareh din raatee taan tan dookh na hoee |1|
lines.english: If someone performs true devotional worship day and night, then his body will not feel pain. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸੇਵੇ ਭਗਤਿ ਨ ਪਾਈਐ ਪੂਰੈ ਭਾਗਿ ਮਿਲੈ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸੋਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bin satigur seve bhagat na paaeeai poorai bhaag milai prabh soee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: But without serving the True Guru, devotional worship is not obtained. Only through perfect destiny does one meet God. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਮੂਲੁ ਗਵਾਵਹਿ ਲਾਭੁ ਮਾਗਹਿ ਲਾਹਾ ਲਾਭੁ ਕਿਦੂ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh mool gavaaveh laabh maageh laahaa laabh kidoo hoee |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs lose their capital, and still, they demand profits. How can they earn any profit?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮਕਾਲੁ ਸਦਾ ਹੈ ਸਿਰ ਊਪਰਿ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਪਤਿ ਖੋਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jamakaal sadaa hai sir aoopar doojai bhaae pat khoee |2|
lines.english: The Messenger of Death is always hovering above their heads. In the love of duality, they lose their honor. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਹਲੇ ਭੇਖ ਭਵਹਿ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤੀ ਹਉਮੈ ਰੋਗੁ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: bahale bhekh bhaveh din raatee haumai rog na jaaee |
lines.english: Trying on all sorts of religious robes, they wander around day and night, but the disease of their egotism is not cured.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੜਿ ਪੜਿ ਲੂਝਹਿ ਬਾਦੁ ਵਖਾਣਹਿ ਮਿਲਿ ਮਾਇਆ ਸੁਰਤਿ ਗਵਾਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: parr parr loojheh baad vakhaaneh mil maaeaa surat gavaaee |3|
lines.english: Reading and studying, they argue and debate; attached to Maya, they lose their awareness. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਿਨਾ ਮਨਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਦਰਿ ਸਾਚੈ ਪਤਿ ਪਾਈ ॥੪॥੪॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: naanak naam jinaa man vasiaa dar saachai pat paaee |4|4|14|
lines.english: O Nanak, those whose minds are filled with the Naam, are honored in the Court of the True Lord. ||4||4||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਹਿ ਪਰਮ ਗਤਿ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਮਿਲੈ ਵਡਿਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: satigur seveh param gat paaveh naam milai vaddiaaee |
lines.english: Those who serve the True Guru are blessed with the supreme status; through the Naam, they are blessed with glorious greatness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਆਸਾ ਨਹੀ ਉਤਰੈ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਖੁਆਏ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh aasaa nahee utarai doojai bhaae khuaae |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukh cannot escape false hope. In the love of duality, he is ruined.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈਰਉ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: bhairau mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Bhairao, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਦਰੁ ਨੈ ਸਾਣੁ ਨ ਭਰੀਐ ਕਬਹੂ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਅਗਨਿ ਪਚਾਏ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: audar nai saan na bhareeai kabahoo trisanaa agan pachaae |1|
lines.english: His belly is like a river - it is never filled up. He is consumed by the fire of desire. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਿਰਦੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਦੁਬਿਧਾ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਗੀ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਪੀ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਾਤੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: hiradai naam dubidhaa man bhaagee har har amrit pee tripataate |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Naam, the Name of the Lord, fills their hearts, and duality runs away from their minds. Drinking in the Ambrosial Nectar of the Lord, Har, Har, they are satisfied. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਅਨੰਦੁ ਰਾਮ ਰਸਿ ਰਾਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa anand raam ras raate |
lines.english: Eternally blissful are those who are imbued with the sublime essence of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਸ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਜਿਨਿ ਸਾਜੀ ਸਿਰਿ ਸਿਰਿ ਧੰਧੈ ਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: aape paarabraham srisatt jin saajee sir sir dhandhai laae |
lines.english: The Supreme Lord God Himself created the Universe; He links each and every person to their tasks.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਨੋ ਕਿਹੁ ਕਹੀਐ ਜੇ ਦੂਜਾ ਹੋਵੈ ਸਭਿ ਤੁਧੈ ਮਾਹਿ ਸਮਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: tis no kihu kaheeai je doojaa hovai sabh tudhai maeh samaae |
lines.english: If there were any other, then I would speak to him; all will be merged in You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹੁ ਕੀਆ ਜਿਨਿ ਆਪੇ ਆਪੇ ਦੂਜੈ ਲਾਏ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: maaeaa mohu keea jin aape aape doojai laae |2|
lines.english: He Himself created love and attachment to Maya; He Himself attaches the mortals to duality. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਤਤੁ ਬੀਚਾਰਾ ਜੋਤੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਮਿਲਾਏ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: guramukh giaan tat beechaaraa jotee jot milaae |3|
lines.english: The Gurmukh contemplates the essence of spiritual wisdom; his light merges into the Light. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸਾਚਾ ਸਦ ਹੀ ਸਾਚਾ ਸਾਚਾ ਸਭੁ ਆਕਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: so prabh saachaa sad hee saachaa saachaa sabh aakaaraa |
lines.english: God is True, Forever True, and all His Creation is True.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਸੋਝੀ ਪਾਈ ਸਚਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਨਿਸਤਾਰਾ ॥੪॥੫॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: naanak satigur sojhee paaee sach naam nisataaraa |4|5|15|
lines.english: O Nanak, the True Guru has given me this understanding; the True Name brings emancipation. ||4||5||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਆਪੁਰਿ ਤ੍ਰੇਤੈ ਮਾਣਸ ਵਰਤਹਿ ਵਿਰਲੈ ਹਉਮੈ ਮਾਰੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: duaapur tretai maanas varateh viralai haumai maaree |1|
lines.english: In the Silver Age of Dwaapur Yuga, and the Brass Age of Traytaa Yuga, mankind prevailed, but only a rare few subdued their egos. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈਰਉ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: bhairau mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Bhairao, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਲਿ ਮਹਿ ਪ੍ਰੇਤ ਜਿਨੑੀ ਰਾਮੁ ਨ ਪਛਾਤਾ ਸਤਜੁਗਿ ਪਰਮ ਹੰਸ ਬੀਚਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: kal meh pret jinaee raam na pachhaataa satajug param hans beechaaree |
lines.english: In this Dark Age of Kali Yuga, those who do not realize the Lord are goblins. In the Golden Age of Sat Yuga, the supreme soul-swans contemplated the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੁਗਿ ਜੁਗਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਏਕੋ ਜਾਤਾ ਵਿਣੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਨ ਪਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jug jug guramukh eko jaataa vin naavai mukat na paaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: In each and every age, the Gurmukhs know the One Lord; without the Name, liberation is not attained. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਲਿ ਮਹਿ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮਿ ਵਡਿਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: kal meh raam naam vaddiaaee |
lines.english: In this Dark Age of Kali Yuga, glorious greatness is obtained through the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਿਰਦੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਲਖੈ ਜਨੁ ਸਾਚਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: hiradai naam lakhai jan saachaa guramukh man vasaaee |
lines.english: The Naam, the Name of the Lord, is revealed in the heart of the True Lord's humble servant. It dwells in the mind of the Gurmukh.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਹੈ ਗੁਣ ਕਾ ਦਾਤਾ ਅਵਗਣ ਸਬਦਿ ਜਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: meraa prabh hai gun kaa daataa avagan sabad jalaae |
lines.english: My Lord God is the Giver of virtue. The Word of the Shabad burns away all faults and demerits.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਤਰੇ ਸਗਲੇ ਕੁਲ ਤਾਰੇ ਜਿਨੀ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: aap tare sagale kul taare jinee raam naam liv laaee |2|
lines.english: Those who are lovingly focused on the Lord's Name save themselves; they save all their ancestors as well. ||2||
